Week 6 | Summary

Summary
As we approached the end of this course, we entered the final phase of the writing process. It was time to revise, edit, and polish your compare-and-contrast essay. This step allowed you to refine your work, making sure your arguments were compelling, your writing flowed smoothly, and everything was polished to perfection. But it was not just about perfecting this one essay; it was also about reflecting on our journey together throughout this course.
